title: hypericum prostratum
intro: Hypericum prostratum, also known as Creeping St. John's Wort, is a low-growing, spreading plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Hypericum prostratum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Hypericum prostratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues.
